nasb.text: For Heshbon was the city of Sihon, king of the Amorites, who had fought against the former king of Moab and had taken all his land out of his hand, as far as the Arnon.

esv.text: For Heshbon was the city of Sihon the king of the Amorites, who had fought against the former king of Moab and taken all his land out of his hand, as far as the Arnon.

cnv.text: 這希實本是亞摩利人的王西宏的京城；西宏曾經與摩押以前的王交戰，從他手中奪去了所有的地，直到亞嫩河。

ccb.text: 希实本是亚摩利王西宏的都城。西宏曾与摩押的先王交战，占领了他所有的领土，远至亚嫩河。
